Footer.tagline: We build brands, websites & AI systems with Swiss precision.
Footer.newsletterBody: Occasional notes on AI, design and growth. No spam.

Home.metaDescription: Swiss digital agency building brands, websites, apps and custom AI systems. Social media, web & app development, and AI solutions — engineered with Swiss precision.

hero.subtitle: Social media management · Web & app development · Custom AI solutions.

services.title: Everything you need to grow online
services.subtitle: From the first pixel to production AI — one team, end to end.

precision.title: Swiss precision & reliability
precision.body: Meticulous craft, clear communication, and deadlines we actually keep.

ai.title: AI-driven efficiency
ai.body: We use AI in our own workflow, so you ship faster and smarter — not just talk about it.

fullstack.title: Brand → web → app → AI
fullstack.body: One partner for the whole journey. No hand-offs, no finger-pointing.

local.title: Multilingual, local service
local.body: Native EN/DE/FR/IT support and a deep understanding of the Swiss market.

process.title: A clear path from idea to growth

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: We learn your goals, audience and market.

design.title: Design
design.body: We craft the brand, UX and visual system.

build.title: Build
build.body: We engineer fast, scalable, AI-ready products.

grow.title: Grow
grow.body: We measure, optimise and scale what works.

aiHighlight.title: We don't just talk about AI — we run on it
aiHighlight.body: This very site has a Claude-powered assistant that can answer questions about our services, pricing and process. Ask it anything.

About.metaDescription: A Swiss digital agency uniting brand, web, app and AI under one roof. Built on precision, trust and data protection.
About.title: Precision is our default setting
About.intro: SwissDigiAI is a Zürich-based digital agency. We unite branding, web, apps and AI under one roof — so ambitious businesses get a single, accountable partner.
About.missionBody: Make world-class digital — design, engineering and AI — accessible to Swiss businesses of every size.
About.whyBody: Precision, trust and rigorous data protection aren't marketing words here — they're how we operate. Your data stays protected, your timelines stay honest, your brand stays sharp.

trust.title: Trust
trust.body: Clear pricing, clear timelines, no surprises.

About.ctaBody: Let's talk about your project — or your career.

Pricing.metaDescription: Transparent packages for branding, web, apps and AI. Monthly retainers and project pricing — Swiss quality, clear numbers.
Pricing.title: Clear pricing, no surprises
Pricing.subtitle: Pick a package or request a custom quote. Prices exclude Swiss VAT (8.1%).
Pricing.customBody: We'll scope a custom quote tailored to your goals.

Contact.metaDescription: Tell us about your project or book a free 30-minute discovery call with SwissDigiAI in Zürich.
Contact.title: Let's start something
Contact.subtitle: Send us a message or book a free 30-minute discovery call. We reply within a few hours.
Contact.bookingBody: Prefer to talk? Grab a 30-minute slot that works for you.

form.name: Name

form.tooShort: Please add a little more detail

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This placeholder privacy policy explains how SwissDigiAI collects and processes personal data in line with the Swiss FADP and the EU GDPR. Replace with your reviewed legal text before launch.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These placeholder terms govern the use of this website and our services. Replace with your reviewed legal text before launch.

Chat.title: SwissDigiAI Assistant
Chat.subtitle: Ask about services, pricing or process
Chat.greeting: Hi! I'm the SwissDigiAI assistant. Ask me about our services, pricing or process — or tell me about your project and I'll point you the right way.
Chat.leadPrompt: Want a human to follow up? Leave your email and we'll be in touch.
Chat.leadSuccess: Thanks! We'll be in touch shortly.
Chat.errorTitle: Our assistant is offline right now
Chat.errorBody: Leave your email and we'll get back to you — your message won't be lost.

Cookie.title: We value your privacy
Cookie.body: We use essential cookies to run this site and optional analytics to improve it. You choose.
